title: sciRplot
text:
pixgallery(
  path = paths,
  caption = captions,
  caption_valign = "below",
  caption_halign = "center",
  link = link,
  h = "120px",
  w = "150px", 
  border_radius = "10px",
  gap = "10px",
  layout = "fixed"
)
